summary: W901 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W900's separate source Pretriangulated, source IsTriangulated, and source-side triangle-completion leaves with the existing W722 source-triangulation data provider. This preserves the W899/W900 endpoint-homology-free closed-map route and keeps W856 endpoint facts plus W721 localized-right-adjoint data intact. Product success remains false because the remaining explicit fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W901 bundles W900 source triangulation data through W722, but the remaining W901 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W901 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W901 fields are WPP right-open boundary data, WPP source-pi-zero boundary data, relation-pullback data, target-relation-lift data, target-difference surjectivity, target-codomain compactness, selected-difference closed-map components, mapped explicit cokernel closed-map data, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, the W722 source-triangulation provider, the W856 endpoint topology facts provider, and the W721 localized-right-adjoint data provider.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-one W901 closed-map source-triangulation endpoint-facts explicit field inputs.

Choose whether the next smallest contract-closing increment should bundle W716 boundary data, W717 relation data, W715 target surjective-compact data, strict preimage object/map fields, fixed-target uniqueness, source-image normalization, or another currently supported provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
